requestedIntent: Prevent guarded and full-BMAD PASS gates from being self-certified by the implementation/developer actor, even when a gate verdict file exists.
limitations: This validates typed gate verdicts and actor records; it cannot prove that an unrecorded nested reviewer existed.
The pre-commit path intentionally checks only gate decider integrity; full surface and persistence evidence remain closeout/CI responsibilities.
The Process Judge actor identity is still cooperative-local and depends on accurate actor records written to disk.
